attributes.action: Protect Health and Productivity by Ending Clock Changes
attributes.additional_details: The twice-yearly clock change disrupts sleep, health, and productivity for millions, especially morning people, families, and shift workers. Modern evidence shows little to no benefit, yet the disruption occurs twice a year, every year. A constant, year-round time would improve wellbeing, safety and consistency across the UK.
attributes.background: End the twice-yearly clock changes. They disrupt sleep, harm morning productivity, and offer no real energy benefit. Adopt a stable, year-round time so that people can plan, work and live without unnecessary disruption.

rejection.details:
End the Twice-Yearly Clock Changes in the UK to Improve Sleep and Wellbeing
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764890
